title: Real API Keys Committed to .env in Version Control
acceptance_criteria: All 7 API keys rotated with new credentials
.env removed from git tracking and added to .gitignore
Git history scrubbed of secrets
detect-secrets pre-commit hook installed and verified

title: Both Dockerfiles Run Containers as Root
acceptance_criteria: Both Dockerfiles contain USER instruction with non-root user
Container starts and passes health check as non-root
Docker image scan reports no root-user finding

title: No Input Sanitization on QR Code Payloads
acceptance_criteria: sanitize_payload() implemented and called before TTS output
Malicious URL schemes (javascript:, data:) are blocked
Payload length is capped
Unit tests cover at least 5 malicious QR payload vectors

title: Single Points of Failure for External Cloud Services
acceptance_criteria: Health check probes implemented for Deepgram, ElevenLabs, and Ollama cloud
Circuit breaker or retry-with-backoff implemented for all cloud calls
At least one fallback STT provider operational when Deepgram is down
System logs clear degradation alerts when falling back to secondary providers

title: FAISS Uses Brute-Force IndexFlatL2 Without Approximate Search
acceptance_criteria: FAISS index type changed to ANN (IVFFlat or HNSWFlat)
Search latency under 50ms for 5K vectors
Existing index migration path tested and documented
Benchmark results recorded for 1K, 5K, 10K vector counts

title: No Type Checker (mypy/pyright) Configured in CI or Locally
acceptance_criteria: mypy or pyright added to dev dependencies and CI pipeline
Initial configuration passes on current codebase (permissive mode)
FusedFrameResult Any fields replaced with concrete types
CI runs type checker (warning-only initially, blocking within 2 sprints)

title: In-Memory State Lost on Process Restart
acceptance_criteria: Critical session state persisted to durable store
Session recovery on startup restores last-known state within 1 second
State checkpoint interval configurable (default: 30 seconds)
Session expiry prevents unbounded storage growth

title: Agent.py Is a 1,900-Line God Object
acceptance_criteria: agent.py reduced to <300 lines (orchestrator only)
Each extracted module is independently testable
All existing tests pass without modification
No circular imports introduced

title: Hardcoded Camera FOV and Resolution Assumptions
acceptance_criteria: FOV and resolution configurable via config.yaml
SceneGraphBuilder and MicroNavFormatter use dynamic camera parameters
Default values maintain backward compatibility
Unit tests verify direction calculation accuracy with different FOV values

title: Duplicate Type Definitions Across shared/schemas and core/vqa/api_schema
acceptance_criteria: Single canonical source of truth for each domain type documented
API schema types have explicit from_domain() converters
No domain logic directly constructs API schema types
All existing tests pass after unification

title: No API Rate Limiting on FastAPI Endpoints
acceptance_criteria: slowapi or equivalent rate limiting middleware installed and configured
Expensive endpoints limited to <=10 requests/minute per IP
HTTP 429 returned with appropriate Retry-After header
Rate limit configuration is externalized

title: FAISS Index and Memory Metadata Not Encrypted at Rest
acceptance_criteria: FAISS index file encrypted at rest using get_encryption_manager()
metadata.json encrypted at rest
Existing unencrypted indexes auto-migrated to encrypted format on first load
Decryption verified on application restart

title: No Graceful Shutdown for Agent or API Server
acceptance_criteria: Signal handlers registered for SIGTERM and SIGINT
FAISS index flushed to disk on shutdown
Tavus sessions cleanly disconnected
Graceful shutdown completes within 10-second timeout

title: 13 Tests Broken Due to Stale Import Path
acceptance_criteria: Import path corrected in test_debug_endpoints.py
All 13 previously-broken tests pass
No new import errors introduced

title: 3,674 Ruff Lint Issues Across Codebase
acceptance_criteria: ruff check . reports 0 issues
ruff format --check . reports 0 files to reformat
Pre-commit hook configured to run ruff on staged files
3 F821 (undefined name) issues fixed (potential bugs)

title: Bare except Clauses Mask Critical Exceptions
acceptance_criteria: All 6 bare except: clauses replaced with specific exception types
ruff check . --select E722 reports 0 issues
Caught exceptions are logged at appropriate level

title: TemporalFilter Thread Safety — Tracks Dict Mutated Without Locks
acceptance_criteria: threading.Lock added to TemporalFilter OR single-thread constraint documented
No data races detectable under concurrent access test
Docstring updated with thread-safety guarantees

title: No Health Check for Local Embedding Service (OllamaEmbedder)
acceptance_criteria: is_ready() method added to OllamaEmbedder
Health check called on startup with clear log message
/health endpoint reports embedding service status
Circuit-breaker prevents repeated failed embedding attempts

title: .env File With Secrets Copied Into Docker Image
acceptance_criteria: .env added to .dockerignore
Docker image built without .env present in any layer
Secrets passed via --env-file or environment variables at runtime
Previously published images audited and revoked if secrets found

title: No Pre-Commit Hooks for Secrets Detection or Linting
acceptance_criteria: .pre-commit-config.yaml exists with detect-secrets and ruff hooks
pre-commit install documented in setup instructions
pre-commit run --all-files passes without critical findings
New commits cannot introduce secrets without explicit override

title: pytest-timeout Not Installed Despite Being Configured in pyproject.toml
acceptance_criteria: pytest-timeout listed as a dev dependency
pytest --co shows no unknown config option: timeout warning
Tests exceeding 120 seconds are properly terminated
CI pipeline benefits from timeout enforcement

title: OllamaEmbedder.embed_text() Is Synchronous — Blocks Async Event Loop
acceptance_criteria: embed_text() is non-blocking in async contexts
Event loop latency during embedding does not exceed 5ms
Memory ingestion and RAG queries do not stall real-time perception pipeline
Batch embedding support added for multiple texts

title: No Fallback STT Provider — Deepgram Is Single Point of Failure
acceptance_criteria: At least one local STT fallback implemented and tested
Automatic failover triggered when Deepgram is unreachable
Fallback latency within 2x of primary STT latency
Clear log message when fallback is activated

title: No TTS Audio Caching by Text Fingerprint
acceptance_criteria: TTS cache implemented with text fingerprint as key
Cache hit rate > 20% during typical navigation session
Repeated navigation cues served from cache within 5ms
Cache size bounded (LRU eviction) to prevent memory growth

title: QR Cache TTL — No In-Memory Expiry, Stale Reads on Clock Skew
acceptance_criteria: Cache TTL uses monotonic clock for in-memory entries
Clock skew does not cause stale reads or premature expiry
Manual cache invalidation method available
Unit test covers TTL enforcement under simulated clock skew

title: YOLODetector Silent Fallback to MockObjectDetector Without Runtime Alert
acceptance_criteria: WARNING-level log emitted when falling back to MockObjectDetector
is_mock flag available on detector instances
/health endpoint reports whether real or mock detector is active
Navigation cues indicate degraded mode when mock detector is in use
